title: Weedol Rootkill Plus Concentrate Tubes, 12 Pack
features: Weedol Gun Rootkill Plus is a systemic weedkiller
It is a total weedkiller for all broad-leaved weeds and grass, killing all weeds to the roots and is used to kill weeds on drives, paths, patios and around the garden
Degrades in soil to allow for replanting
For paths, patios, drives and flowerbeds
description: Product Description Weedol is a total weedkiller for all broad-leaved weeds and grass, kills all weeds to the roots and is used to treat weeds on drives, paths, patios and around the garden. Directions 1. Dilute the concentrate as directed on the label. 2. Apply the solution to the affected areas using a sprayer or watering can. 3. Avoid applying in windy conditions or when rain is expected. 4. Keep people and pets away from the treated area until it has dried. 5. Repeat treatment if necessary. Safety Warning Use plant protection products safely. Always read the label and product information before use. This product is a home garden weed killer and should not be used on crops or food plants. See more
